author: codex-auto-release

patch.value: Automate change-aware daily releases with npm and Bun verification

Port the proven pm-cli daily auto-release model to jellyfin-cli: detect release-relevant commits after the latest tag, compute calendar versions, regenerate CHANGELOG.md exclusively from closed pm items with pm-changelog, pass the full release gate, push a release commit and tag, publish to npm with provenance, and prove consumption through both npx and bunx.

Every pre-existing CHANGELOG.md bullet is represented by a closed pm item and survives package-generated replacement.; Scheduled and manual auto-release skip when no release-relevant commits exist after the latest tag and never cut more than one release per UTC day by default.; The release pipeline computes YYYY.M.D or YYYY.M.D-N, regenerates CHANGELOG.md with pm-changelog, runs release validation, and atomically pushes the release commit and tag.; Tag-driven publishing uses npm provenance, is safely retryable, creates a GitHub release, and verifies the exact published version through npm, npx, and bunx/Bun.; Maintainer setup, secrets, architecture, recovery, local parity, and Bun registry semantics are documented in detail and linked from the pm item.
Make releases routine, auditable, and impossible to silently omit when real product changes land.
Reduces manual release risk while preserving historical release notes and validating both Node/npm and Bun consumers.
A pm-cli-parity daily release pipeline with deterministic pm-generated changelogs and verified public package delivery.
The repository has manual release workflows and a hand-maintained changelog, but no change-aware scheduled driver or package-owned changelog guarantee.

message: Track pm-cli parity auto-release and changelog migration

author: codex-auto-release
message: Begin pm-cli parity implementation after all-status lineage and changelog preservation audit

value.note: Canonical auto-release architecture,setup,changelog ownership,npm and Bun semantics,and recovery

value.author: codex-auto-release
value.text: Legacy changelog preservation proof: git HEAD contained 19 bullets; pm-changelog 2026.7.18 generated 26 bullets with missingLegacyEntries=[] and seven additional closed pm records that the hand-maintained file had omitted.

value.author: codex-auto-release
value.text: Full local release gate passed on 2026-07-21: 893 tests passed, 177 credential-dependent E2E tests skipped, zero failures; typecheck, lint, build, dist smoke, file-length, tracked/history secret scans, npm pack, npx tarball smoke, bunx --bun tarball smoke, and pm changelog check all passed.

author: codex-auto-release

value.author: codex-auto-release
value.text: Bun does not use a separate public package registry for this CLI: bunx resolves packages from registry.npmjs.org. Correct dual-consumer delivery is one npm provenance publish followed by exact-version npx and bunx --bun verification, not a duplicate bun publish.

message: Document npm and Bun registry semantics

patch.value: Ported and adapted the pm-cli auto-release architecture to jellyfin-cli, consolidated obsolete manual workflows into Auto Release plus tag-driven Release, and made pm-changelog the single changelog owner.
Release-relevant changes are automatically versioned, documented, validated, published once to npm, and verified for both Node/npm and Bun consumers without losing historical changelog data.
The complete local gate, actionlint v1.7.7, lossless 19-of-19 changelog comparison, local npx/bunx packed-package proofs, and exact public 2026.3.6 npm/npx/bunx verification all passed.

Implemented pm-cli-parity change-aware daily release preparation, lossless pm-changelog ownership, atomic release commit/tag creation, idempotent npm provenance publishing, exact npm/npx/Bun verification, scheduled blocker reporting, focused automation tests, and detailed maintainer documentation. Preservation proof retained all 19 legacy bullets and added seven previously omitted closed pm records; full release validation passed with 893 tests and zero failures.

value.author: codex-auto-release
value.text: Final governance validation after historical backfill: 27 closed items checked with zero missing resolution fields; 29 item histories checked with zero drift, missing streams, unreadable streams, hash mismatches, or chain mismatches.

value.author: codex-auto-release
value.text: Dry-run verification exposed and fixed a no-op managed-extension timestamp rewrite: fresh checks now install missing pm-changelog files but restore the registry byte-for-byte when the managed entry is unchanged.

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: Post-review hardening: exact UTC-date tag matching now excludes later calendar days with the same prefix; malformed registry JSON remains inside the publication retry loop; process-start failures retain the operating-system diagnostic; and all changelog paths use the verified, pinned pm CLI release 2026.7.21 for reproducibility. Focused regression tests cover each behavior. No credentials or private environment details are recorded in this tracker.
